notes: TCGplayer Authentication Center study (1,500 packs opened), relayed by PokeBeach. Per-pack odds: shiny rare (baby shiny) 1/4 replacing the first reverse-holo slot; illustration rare 1/14, special illustration rare 1/58 and hyper rare 1/62 replacing the second reverse-holo slot; ultra rare 1/15 and shiny ultra rare 1/13 modeled in the rare slot. Double rare 1/8 taken from the independent 536-pack DigitalTQ sample (13.25%), consistent with other SV sets. Reverse filler approximated as a 50/50 common/uncommon split. packSize excludes the basic Energy and code card. Special set: no booster box display (ETB, booster bundles and collection products only).
